title: ranunculus sardous subsp. angulatus
intro: Ranunculus sardous subsp. angulatus, also known as Sardinian clematis or sharp-leaved buttercup, is a plant species within the Ranunculus genus. It has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Europe, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Ranunculus sardous subsp. angulatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
